title: Claims
workspaceSubtitle: Follow the needs you claimed, review incoming helpers on your own needs, and continue each related conversation.
sentEmpty: You have not claimed any needs yet.
receivedEmpty: No helpers have claimed your needs yet.
openClaimHint: Open this claim to continue the conversation and review the latest status.
reviewClaimHint: Open this claim to reply, continue the thread, or settle the need when fulfilled.

settleConfirm.title: Settle this claim?
settleConfirm.message: Settling confirms the need has been fulfilled. Any Topes offered will be transferred to the claimer. This action cannot be undone.
